clusters.title: Why is it so difficult to invest in Sri Lanka?

versions.title: Why is it so difficult to invest in Sri Lanka?
versions.deck: Over the years, I have heard the same frustration from investors. They arrive with genuine interest, spend time exploring opportunities, hold meetings, visit sites, discuss structures, and then somewhere along the way their enthusiasm begins to drain away.

versions.title: Safeguarding Jaffna College and Uduvil Girls’ College

clusters.title: My priority is to take Sri Lanka to top of the tree in world cricket – Kirsten

versions.title: My priority is to take Sri Lanka to top of the tree in world cricket – Kirsten
versions.deck: After a considerable period, Sri Lanka cricket has secured a top-quality coach to handle the national team in the form of Gary Kirsten, whose proven record speaks for itself, having guided India to win the 2011 Cricket World Cup, beating Sri Lanka in the final, and having taken his native South Africa to the top of the ICC Test rankings.

clusters.title: Govt. says President has not made request to remove SLC Head

versions.title: Govt. says President has not made request to remove SLC Head
versions.deck: The Government and Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC) have said that they are not aware that President Anura Kumara Dissanayake has asked SLC President Shammi Silva to step down to facilitate the appointment of an interim committee.

clusters.title: Yamal scores but injured as Barcelona beat Celta to restore La Liga lead

versions.title: Yamal scores but injured as Barcelona beat Celta to restore La Liga lead
versions.deck: Lamine Yamal was injured while converting a penalty in Barcelona’s Spanish league win against Celta Vigo.

clusters.title: Sri Lanka XV brace for Kiwi Test ahead of Asia Rugby Top 4

versions.title: Sri Lanka XV brace for Kiwi Test ahead of Asia Rugby Top 4
versions.deck: Sri Lanka XV will face a stern test against the visiting New Zealand Under-85kg side in a two-match series designed to sharpen the national outfit ahead of next month’s Asia Rugby Top 4 tournament.

clusters.title: Real Madrid close on Barcelona as Mbappe and Vinicius net against Alaves

versions.title: Real Madrid close on Barcelona as Mbappe and Vinicius net against Alaves
versions.deck: Kylian Mbappe and Vinicius Junior each scored as Real Madrid ended a four-game winless streak by defeating Alaves 2-1 to move closer to Spanish league leader Barcelona.

clusters.title: Royal College Rugby Season 2026 kicks off

versions.title: Royal College Rugby Season 2026 kicks off
versions.deck: Royal College, Colombo, is set to launch the Inter-Schools Rugby Tournament on 26 April 2026, against Science College. The much-anticipated Under-19 rugby season is just around the corner, with leading schools preparing to deliver an exciting and competitive tournament for rugby enthusiasts.

clusters.title: Brandix props up with Royal Rugby as Platinum Sponsor

versions.title: Brandix props up with Royal Rugby as Platinum Sponsor
versions.deck: Royal College has officially launched its 2026 rugby season with strong backing from an impressive list of sponsors, reaffirming the school’s status as one of Sri Lanka’s leading rugby powerhouses. Brandix had shown confidence in the Reid Avenue outfit with their signing as the Platinum sponsor for the 2026 rugby season.

clusters.title: Mckyle leads Thomians at Rugby

versions.title: Mckyle leads Thomians at Rugby
versions.deck: S. Thomas’ College, Mount Lavinia will be led by Number 8, Mckyle Karunaratne for the 2026 rugby season with high hopes of restoring their proud rugby legacy and bringing glory back to the school. With a rich sporting tradition spanning 175 years, Thomian rugby remains one of the most respected names in school rugby.

clusters.title: Treasury officially responds: Claims hackers behind theft of funds

versions.title: Treasury officially responds: Claims hackers behind theft of funds
versions.deck: The Finance, Planning and Economic Development Ministry yesterday said cyber hackers had breached its systems, resulting in a reported loss of $ 2.5 million which was part of a bilateral payment to Australia.

clusters.title: Treasury rocked by $ 2.5 m fraud

versions.title: Treasury rocked by $ 2.5 m fraud
versions.deck: The Government is facing scrutiny following reports that $ 2.5 million (nearly Rs. 800 million) of Treasury funds was diverted during a foreign debt repayment, with the amount yet to reach the intended creditor country.

clusters.title: EPF assets rise 13.6% to Rs. 5 t in 2025

versions.title: EPF assets rise 13.6% to Rs. 5 t in 2025
versions.deck: The Employees’ Provident Fund (EPF) recorded a 13.6% increase in net worth to Rs. 4.9 trillion at end-2025, up from Rs. 4.4 trillion a year earlier, according to the Central Bank of Sri Lanka’s (CBSL) Annual Economic Review 2025.

clusters.title: EPF equity portfolio value up 27% to Rs. 188.9 b in 2025

versions.title: EPF equity portfolio value up 27% to Rs. 188.9 b in 2025
versions.deck: The Employees’ Provident Fund (EPF) recorded a sharp increase in the market value of its listed equity portfolio in 2025, rising to Rs. 188.85 billion as at 31 December from Rs. 148.25 billion a year earlier, reflecting a broad-based recovery in share prices.

clusters.title: Mideast war takes toll on tea, March exports down 16% YoY

versions.title: Mideast war takes toll on tea, March exports down 16% YoY
versions.deck: Asia Siyaka Commodities yesterday said the escalation of tensions between the US, Israel, and Iran significantly impacted tea exports in March, following the bombing of Iran on 28 February and subsequent retaliatory attacks on Israel and the Gulf States.

versions.title: Inadequate LPG price hike compels poor to subsidise wealthy: Advocata

clusters.title: Why systems thinking is the next step for clinical governance in Sri Lanka

versions.title: Why systems thinking is the next step for clinical governance in Sri Lanka
versions.deck: A child presents to a busy private clinic with persistent headaches. The consultation is brief. There is no structured documentation template, no escalation pathway and no system to ensure follow-up. Weeks later, the family seeks help elsewhere with worsening symptoms.

clusters.title: Sri Lanka to see slow growth, widening fiscal deficit: Fitch

versions.title: Sri Lanka to see slow growth, widening fiscal deficit: Fitch
versions.deck: Fitch Ratings has said that Sri Lanka’s recovery remains fragile despite improved macroeconomic fundamentals, with the Middle East energy shock now testing the gains achieved through stabilisation and reforms. In its latest Sri Lanka update on credit development, Fitch said growth is expected to slow, inflation to rise and the fiscal deficit to widen in 2026, even as the economy builds on stronger fundamentals following the 2022 crisis.
